# useNavigation

Derives active, child, and badge state for typed application navigation trees.

## Contents

- [Usage](#usage)
- [Actions](#actions)
- [Active state](#active-state)
- [API Reference](#api-reference)

## Usage

Define navigation as plain `Menu` data, then pass the menu or a reactive getter to `useNavigation`. Each returned item contains the original configuration plus derived state for rendering.

*navigation.ts*

```typescript
import { useNavigation } from '@stacktrace/ui'
import type { Menu } from '@stacktrace/ui'
import { UsersIcon } from '@lucide/vue'

const menu: Menu = [
  {
    title: 'Customers',
    icon: UsersIcon,
    action: { route: 'customers.index' },
    active: [
      { route: 'customers.index' },
      { route: 'customers.show' },
    ],
  },
]

const navigation = useNavigation(menu)
```

## Actions

A menu item can navigate to a literal URL, a Ziggy route, an Inertia path, or run an event callback. A plain string is treated as a URL. Route actions require Ziggy's global `route()` helper.

## Active state

By default, link-like actions are matched against the current Inertia path or browser URL. Set `active` to one or more explicit activations when several destinations belong to one menu item or when active state is determined by application logic.

## API Reference

### `useNavigation`

Maps a menu tree to reactive navigation items with derived active, child, and badge state.

```typescript
function useNavigation(
  menu: MaybeRefOrGetter<Menu>,
): ComputedRef<Navigation>
```

#### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `menu` (required) | `MaybeRefOrGetter<Menu>` | Provides a static or reactive menu tree. |

#### Returns

`ComputedRef<Navigation>` — A reactive tree of derived NavigationItem objects.

### `useActiveLink`

Creates a computed active-state value for one link activation.

```typescript
function useActiveLink(
  link: MaybeRefOrGetter<MenuItemActivation>,
): ComputedRef<boolean>
```

#### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `link` (required) | `MaybeRefOrGetter<MenuItemActivation>` | Provides the activation to evaluate reactively. |

#### Returns

`ComputedRef<boolean>` — Whether the activation currently matches.

### `isActivated`

Evaluates one activation or an array of alternatives against explicit path and URL inputs.

```typescript
function isActivated(
  activation: MenuItemActivation | MenuItemActivation[],
  currentPath: string,
  currentUrl: URL | null,
): boolean
```

#### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `activation` (required) | `MenuItemActivation \| MenuItemActivation[]` | Provides one activation or alternatives matched with OR semantics. |
| `currentPath` (required) | `string` | Provides the current Inertia page path. |
| `currentUrl` (required) | `URL \| null` | Provides the browser URL for internal and external URL comparison. |

#### Returns

`boolean` — Whether any supplied activation matches the current location.

### Action type guards

The package exports guards for narrowing `MenuItemAction` before reading action-specific properties or executing an event action.

```typescript
isRouteAction(action): action is RouteAction
isLinkAction(action): action is LinkAction
isLinkPathAction(action): action is LinkPathAction
isEventAction(action): action is EventAction
```

| Function | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `isRouteAction` | `(action: MenuItemAction) => action is RouteAction` | Checks for an object with a route property. |
| `isLinkAction` | `(action: MenuItemAction) => action is LinkAction` | Checks for an object with a url property. |
| `isLinkPathAction` | `(action: MenuItemAction) => action is LinkPathAction` | Checks for an object with a path property. |
| `isEventAction` | `(action: MenuItemAction) => action is EventAction` | Checks whether the action is a callback function. |

### `LinkAction`

Navigates to an internal or external URL.

```typescript
type LinkAction = {
  url: string
  external?: boolean
  preserveScroll?: boolean
  preserveState?: boolean
  progress?: boolean
}
```

| Property | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `url` (required) | `string` | Sets the destination URL. |
| `external` | `boolean` | Uses a native anchor instead of an Inertia link when true. |
| `preserveScroll` | `boolean` | Preserves scroll during an internal Inertia visit. |
| `preserveState` | `boolean` | Preserves local page state during an internal Inertia visit. |
| `progress` | `boolean` | Carries progress-display intent for consumers that support it. |

### `RouteAction`

Builds an internal destination from a named Ziggy route.

```typescript
type RouteAction = {
  route: string
  params?: any
  preserveScroll?: boolean
  preserveState?: boolean
  progress?: boolean
}
```

| Property | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `route` (required) | `string` | Sets the Ziggy route name. |
| `params` | `any` | Provides parameters passed to the Ziggy route helper. |
| `preserveScroll` | `boolean` | Preserves scroll during an internal Inertia visit. |
| `preserveState` | `boolean` | Preserves local page state during an internal Inertia visit. |
| `progress` | `boolean` | Carries progress-display intent for consumers that support it. |

### `LinkPathAction`

Navigates to an explicit Inertia path.

```typescript
type LinkPathAction = {
  path: string
  preserveScroll?: boolean
  preserveState?: boolean
  progress?: boolean
}
```

| Property | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `path` (required) | `string` | Sets the internal Inertia path. |
| `preserveScroll` | `boolean` | Preserves scroll during an internal Inertia visit. |
| `preserveState` | `boolean` | Preserves local page state during an internal Inertia visit. |
| `progress` | `boolean` | Carries progress-display intent for consumers that support it. |

### `EventAction`

Runs application behavior instead of navigating.

```typescript
type EventAction<Event = any> = (event?: Event) => void
```

### `MenuItemAction`

The complete set of actions accepted by a menu item. A string is treated as a URL.

```typescript
type MenuItemAction<Event = any> =
  | string
  | RouteAction
  | LinkAction
  | LinkPathAction
  | EventAction<Event>
```

### `MenuItemActivation`

The link-like matchers and predicates accepted by explicit active state.

```typescript
type MenuItemActivation =
  | LinkAction
  | RouteAction
  | LinkPathAction
  | (() => boolean)
```

### `MenuItemIcon`

Accepts either a Vue component or serialized SVG source.

```typescript
type MenuItemIcon = Component | SVGSource
```

### `MenuItem`

Defines one source item before navigation state is derived.

```typescript
interface MenuItem<Event = any> {
  title: string
  action?: MenuItemAction<Event> | null
  badge?: string | null
  active?: MenuItemActivation | MenuItemActivation[]
  icon?: MenuItemIcon | null
  children?: Array<MenuItem>
}
```

| Property | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `title` (required) | `string` | Provides the visible item label. |
| `action` | `MenuItemAction<Event> \| null` | Defines navigation or event behavior. |
| `badge` | `string \| null` | Provides optional badge content. |
| `active` | `MenuItemActivation \| MenuItemActivation[]` | Overrides the default action-based active-state matching. |
| `icon` | `MenuItemIcon \| null` | Provides a Vue icon component or serialized SVG source. |
| `children` | `Array<MenuItem>` | Provides nested source menu items. |

### `NavigationItem`

Extends a MenuItem with state derived from its action, activation, badge, and descendants.

```typescript
interface NavigationItem extends Omit<MenuItem, 'children'> {
  isActive: boolean
  isChildActive: boolean
  hasChildren: boolean
  hasBadge: boolean
  hasChildBadge: boolean
  children?: Array<NavigationItem>
}
```

| Property | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `isActive` (required) | `boolean` | Indicates whether this item matches the current location. |
| `isChildActive` (required) | `boolean` | Indicates whether any descendant is active. |
| `hasChildren` (required) | `boolean` | Indicates whether the source item contains children. |
| `hasBadge` (required) | `boolean` | Indicates whether this item has non-empty badge content. |
| `hasChildBadge` (required) | `boolean` | Indicates whether any descendant has non-empty badge content. |
| `children` | `Array<NavigationItem>` | Contains recursively derived child items. |

All non-children properties from `MenuItem` remain available on the derived item.

### `Navigation`

A derived navigation tree returned by useNavigation.

```typescript
type Navigation = Array<NavigationItem>
```

### `Menu`

A source menu tree accepted by useNavigation.

```typescript
type Menu = Array<MenuItem>
```

Hosted documentation: [useNavigation](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/composables/navigation)
